creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for working on this.

While here, I think you can (and should) use graphics/silgraphite as a dependency and get rid of the corresponding ext_sources file.

Unfortunately, we cannot use the system boost due to a bug (which I PR'd but no one has followed up).

Also, FWIW, this version was somewhat buggy so there will be a new 4.1.1 release soon.
